name: unifi-protect
description: UniFi Protect MCP server — manage security cameras, NVR, recordings, and smart detections

interface.shortDescription: Manage UniFi Protect cameras, events, recordings, and detections
interface.longDescription: Use UniFi Protect MCP tools and skills in Codex to inspect cameras and events, summarize security activity, review recordings, and apply safe preview-before-confirm device mutations against a UniFi Protect controller.
defaultPrompt: Set up UniFi Protect MCP for Codex
